rows.notes: Clear, centered page year title, no monetary amount present. Very legible.

Another 'Mid' line also showing '12 10'. Same slight faintness as the previous 'Mid' line; aligned by projecting column positions from the final total.

Two-part amount '39 8' aligns to pounds and shillings. Numerals are relatively large and clear; pence column blank (interpreted as 0).
Amount '1 1' (£1 1s) aligned by projected columns; amount legible though small. Description reading 'Corona' is faint but consistent with surrounding entries.

'10' sits in the pounds column by alignment. Description contains parentheses and abbreviation; numeral is distinct.
Two-part '1 5' clearly placed as £1 5s by column projection; digits are neat and consistent with nearby entries.
